name: Wrapped Ether
description: The canonical WETH contract used across DeFi. Allows native ETH to be used wherever ERC-20 tokens are required. 1 WETH is always redeemable for exactly 1 ETH.
risks: No upgradeability — critical DeFi infrastructure with no ability to patch
Wrapping locks ETH in the contract — any exploit could affect all deposited ETH
No Permit (EIP-2612) support — predates gasless approval standard

deposit.title: Wrap ETH
deposit.description: Wrap ETH into WETH. Send ETH with this transaction to receive the same amount in WETH.
deposit.warning: Sends ETH value — make sure msg.value is set.

withdraw.title: Unwrap WETH
withdraw.description: Unwrap WETH back to native ETH. Burns WETH and sends you ETH.

wad.label: amount
wad.description: Amount of WETH to unwrap (in wei)

balanceOf.title: Balance
balanceOf.description: Check the WETH balance of any address.

totalSupply.title: Total Supply
totalSupply.description: Total amount of WETH in existence (ETH locked in the contract).

allowance.description: Check how much WETH an address has approved another address to spend.

approve.description: Approve a spender to transfer up to the given amount of your WETH.

transferFrom.description: Transfer WETH from one address to another, using a previously set allowance.

name.description: The name of the token (Wrapped Ether).

decimals.description: Number of decimal places (18, same as ETH).

Deposit.description: Emitted when ETH is wrapped into WETH.

Withdrawal.description: Emitted when WETH is unwrapped back to ETH.

Approval.description: Emitted when an approval is set.
